title: Antibody-Assisted Selective Isolation of Purkinje Cell Nuclei
author: Switonski, Pawel
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0

steps.instruction: Sun1/sfGFP+, Pcp2-Cre+ and Sun1/sfGFP+, Pcp2-Cre- cryosectioned cerebella immunostained for the Myc tag (files 3037, 3046), which is fused to the GFP protein, Calbindin (files 3038, 3047) and Hoechst (files 3036, 3045). Original uncropped images from western blot analysis of TOM20, Histone H3, and GAPDH.
